curation.synopsis: A plague of undeath sweeps across the world of Antagonis, raising the dead to prey upon the living. The Black Dragons, a grim and mutated Chapter shunned by much of the Imperium, answer the call to save what souls they can. Allied with the Inquisitor Werner Lettinger and a contingent of the Sisters of Battle, Captain Volos and his warriors wade into a nightmare of contagion and horror. But the rising dead are only a symptom: behind the outbreak lurk the dread powers of Chaos, working toward a darker design. As one costly victory follows another, the Black Dragons find their numbers, their certainties and their unity steadily worn away.

flags.reason: Chaos power behind the undeath plague not confidently attributable to a specific god or legion from available sources; generic Chaos faction omitted
